---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement for SIP-Bench
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Proposal

Describe the capability you want to add.

## Motivation

Explain why it matters for SIP-Bench. Good reasons usually relate to:

1. protocol correctness
2. reproducibility
3. benchmark extensibility
4. usability for open-source contributors

## Scope

State which area this touches:

- schemas
- metrics
- runner
- protocol suites
- benchmark adapters
- docs
- release engineering

## Expected Outcome

Describe the concrete user-facing or researcher-facing outcome.

## Non-Goals

Call out what this request should not expand into.
